title: Vežba 117

questions.text: Razumete argument Anu, ali želite da uvedete drugačiju perspektivu. Šta biste mogli reći?

answers.answer: Maybe, but we also need to ensure everyone has the basic equipment to work remotely.
I completely agree. Everyone should use their stipend however they want, with no guidelines.
answers.feedback: Kada Anna predlaže fleksibilnost, ne kaže da pravila uopšte ne treba da postoje.

dialogue.text: Wouldn't it be simpler to let people decide how to use their stipend based on their individual needs?

instructions: Slušajte audio odgovor na pitanje ispod.
explanation:
Maybe, but... koristi se da priznaš nečiji argument, a zatim uvedeš drugačije gledište. Na primer:

  • Lily: We could move the meeting to the afternoon.

  • Mark: Maybe, but some people might not be available then. — Ova osoba priznaje mogućnost, ali ukazuje na potencijalni problem sa terminom.

U tačnom odgovoru slažeš se da je fleksibilnost dobra, ali ističeš još jedan važan faktor koji treba uzeti u obzir.
